title: Lightning
description: Overhaul Modpack | Not enjoying Minecraft anymore? Try this !
body:
![Northoff Presents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29b23cb27c93a38e61c76c73a4ab41dd5c651dd3.jpeg) Be ready to experience the **Ultimate Modpack**! # **FEATURES:** ☑️ Full Overhauled Modpack ☑️ Over 250 Mods ☑️ Maximum optimized with Shaders support ☑️ Nearly all Mods custom configured for compability and enjoyment ☑️ Enchanced Vanilla gameplay and tons of new content ☑️ Customized Main Menu and Panorama animation ☑️ All settings and keybinds are configured # **RECOMMENDATIONS:** ⚠️Never change server-side mod configurations! ❗️Assign at least 6 GB of RAM to Minecraft! 🔝Use the shaders that are included in the modpack! # **SUPPORT OR QUESTIONS:**

🌐 **Searching members, modders and moderators for my discord server and Modrinth Organization. [Want to join our team?](https://forms.gle/Ka17LVrat39PkWZw7)** 💞 I would really appreciate if u give me recommendations for my modpack 💞 ![Have fun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1824f726cdccccad5be6af6bf3b5472dea045580.png)
Spoiler # licensed mods: SPECIAL THANKS TO: **PMulberry**,**noxgame1230**,**magistu_** and **mongoose_artist** letting me use their mods. Epic Knights: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-armor-and-weapons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-armor-and-weapons) Epic Knights: Addon: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-addon/files/4971264](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-addon/files/4971264) Epic Knights: Slavic Armory: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-slavic-armory/files/4897796](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-slavic-armory/files/4897796) Sleeping Time: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bedtime](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bedtime) Healing Bed: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/healing-bed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/healing-bed) FPS Increaser: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fps-increaser](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fps-increaser) Born in Chaos: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos) Extra Golems: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-golems/files/5088045](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-golems/files/5088045) Gravestone: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod) Advancement Plaques: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancement-plaques](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancement-plaques) Dungeons Arise: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise)
